components.readme:
# feedlog-badge

## Styling

`--feedlog-badge-*` and variant colors (`--feedlog-blue-*`, `--feedlog-red-*`, `--feedlog-muted-*`) are defined on `:host` in [`feedlog-badge.css`](./feedlog-badge.css); override from a parent such as `feedlog-issues` or `feedlog-issues-client`. See [Customize Feedlog styling](../../../../../docs/CUSTOMIZE_FEEDLOG_STYLING.md).
components.docs:
Feedlog Badge Component

A label component with variant support for different styles.

props.name: variant
props.docs: Badge variant style

Feedlog Button Component

A button component with variant and size support.

props.name: disabled
props.docs: Disabled state

props.name: size

props.name: variant
props.docs: Button variant style

events.docs: Event emitted when button is clicked

components.readme:
# feedlog-card

Named slots: `header`, `content`, and `footer`. Styling uses [`feedlog-card.css`](./feedlog-card.css); parent themes can set `--feedlog-*` where shared with other Feedlog components.
components.docs: Named slots: `header`, `content`, and `footer`. Styling uses [`feedlog-card.css`](./feedlog-card.css); parent themes can set `--feedlog-*` where shared with other Feedlog components.

props.name: collapsible
props.docs: When true, header toggles collapsing the content slot; footer stays visible. Default off.

props.name: embed
props.docs: Flat surface (no inner card border/shadow) for nesting inside another shell (e.g. feedlog-issue).

components.docs:
Feedlog Issue Component

A component for displaying a single GitHub issue.

props.name: collapsible
props.docs: When true, nested `feedlog-card` uses a collapsible body (header toggles markdown; footer unchanged).

props.name: issue
props.docs: The issue to display

props.name: issueUrl
props.docs:
Optional URL for the GitHub issue. When provided along with githubIssueLink,
shows a "View on GitHub" button. Required because owner is no longer in the API response.

props.name: theme
props.docs: Theme variant: 'light' or 'dark'

events.detail: { issueId: string; upvoted: boolean; upvoteCount: number; }

complexType.resolved: { issueId: string; upvoted: boolean; upvoteCount: number; }

events.docs: Event emitted when the issue is upvoted

components.readme:
# feedlog-issues

## Styling

Container and list chrome tokens are set on `:host` in [`feedlog-issues.css`](./feedlog-issues.css). Override `--feedlog-*` on `feedlog-issues` or `feedlog-issues-client` (or an ancestor). Full reference: [Customize Feedlog styling](../../../../../docs/CUSTOMIZE_FEEDLOG_STYLING.md). Per-issue card and upvote variables: [feedlog-issue readme](../feedlog-issue/readme.md#css-customization).
components.docs:
Feedlog Issues Component

Component for displaying issues with support for bugs and enhancements.
Includes full list rendering, loading/error states, and pagination support.

props.name: collapsible
props.docs: When true, each issue card uses a collapsible body (header toggles body; footer unchanged).

props.name: emptyStateMessage
props.docs: Empty state message. Defaults to "Check back later for the latest news and updates.".

props.name: emptyStateTitle
props.docs: Empty state title. Defaults to "Nothing to see here".

props.name: error
props.docs: Error message - shows error state when set

props.name: getIssueUrl
props.docs:
Optional callback to resolve issue URL when githubIssueLink is not available.
Required because repository.owner was removed from the API for privacy.

props.name: hasMore
props.docs: Whether there are more issues available (controls Next button / Load More visibility)

props.name: hasPrev
props.docs: Whether a previous page is available (for prev-next mode)

props.name: heading
props.docs: Custom heading for the issues section

props.name: isLoadingMore
props.docs: Whether more issues are currently loading

props.name: issues
props.docs: Array of issues to display

props.name: limit
props.docs: Number of items per page. Used to determine skeleton count during load-more.

props.name: loadMoreLabel
props.docs: Label for the load-more button (load-more pagination mode only).

props.name: loading
props.docs: Loading state - shows loading indicator when true

props.name: maxWidth
props.docs: Maximum width of the container

props.name: paginationType
props.docs:
Pagination strategy: 'load-more' appends issues with a button,
'prev-next' shows prev/next arrow navigation.

props.name: subtitle
props.docs: Custom subtitle for the issues section

props.name: theme
props.docs: Theme variant: 'light' or 'dark'

events.docs: Event emitted to load more issues (load-more mode)
Event emitted when navigating pages (prev-next mode)
Event emitted when the user clicks retry on the error state

events.detail: { issueId: string; upvoted: boolean; upvoteCount: number; }

complexType.resolved: { issueId: string; upvoted: boolean; upvoteCount: number; }

events.docs: Event emitted when an issue is upvoted

components.readme:
# feedlog-issues-client

## Styling

Set `--feedlog-*` on this element or a wrapper; custom properties inherit through shadow DOM into `feedlog-issues` and issue cards. See [Customize Feedlog styling](../../../../../docs/CUSTOMIZE_FEEDLOG_STYLING.md) and [feedlog-issue readme](../feedlog-issue/readme.md#css-customization).
components.docs:
Feedlog Issues Client Component

A component for displaying issues fetched using the Feedlog SDK.
This component uses the SDK internally to fetch data and delegates to feedlog-issues for rendering.

props.name: apiKey
props.docs: Set via JS property only; not reflected to an HTML attribute (see Stencil `reflect`).

props.name: collapsible
props.docs: When true, each issue card uses a collapsible body.

props.name: emptyStateMessage
props.docs: Empty state message (e.g. "Check back later for new updates.")

props.name: emptyStateTitle
props.docs: Empty state title (e.g. "No updates yet")

props.name: endpoint
props.docs: Custom API endpoint

props.name: getIssueUrl
props.docs:
Optional callback to resolve issue URL when githubIssueLink is not available.
Required because repository.owner was removed from the API for privacy.

props.name: heading
props.docs: Custom heading for the issues section

props.name: limit
props.docs: Maximum number of issues per page (1-100, default 10)

props.name: loadMoreLabel
props.docs: Label for the load-more button (load-more pagination mode only).

props.name: maxWidth
props.docs: Maximum width of the container

props.name: minSkeletonTime
props.docs:
Minimum time in ms to display skeleton placeholders before replacing
with real data. Prevents flickering on fast networks.

props.name: paginationType
props.docs:
Pagination strategy: 'load-more' appends issues with a button,
'prev-next' shows prev/next arrow navigation with prefetching.

props.name: sortBy
props.docs: Sort issues by field: 'createdAt' or 'updatedAt'

props.name: subtitle
props.docs: Custom subtitle for the issues section

props.name: theme
props.docs: Theme variant: 'light' or 'dark'

props.name: type
props.docs: Filter issues by type: 'bug' or 'enhancement'

events.detail: { issueId: string; upvoted: boolean; upvoteCount: number; }

complexType.original: { issueId: string; upvoted: boolean; upvoteCount: number }
complexType.resolved: { issueId: string; upvoted: boolean; upvoteCount: number; }

events.docs: Event emitted when an issue is upvoted

components.readme:
# feedlog-issues-list

## Styling

Empty-state illustration colors use `--feedlog-empty-illustration-*` on `:host` in [`feedlog-issues-list.css`](./feedlog-issues-list.css); values typically inherit from parent feed components. See [Customize Feedlog styling](../../../../../docs/CUSTOMIZE_FEEDLOG_STYLING.md).
components.docs:
Feedlog Issues List Component

A component for displaying a list of GitHub issues with support for bugs and enhancements.

props.name: collapsible
props.docs: When true, each `feedlog-issue` uses a collapsible card body.

props.name: emptyStateMessage
props.docs: Empty state message. When provided with emptyStateTitle, shows a richer empty state with illustration.

props.name: emptyStateTitle
props.docs: Empty state title. When provided with emptyStateMessage, shows a richer empty state with illustration.

props.name: getIssueUrl
props.docs: Optional callback to resolve GitHub issue URL when githubIssueLink is not available.

props.name: issues
props.docs: Array of issues to display

props.name: theme
props.docs: Theme variant: 'light' or 'dark'

events.detail: { issueId: string; upvoted: boolean; upvoteCount: number; }

complexType.resolved: { issueId: string; upvoted: boolean; upvoteCount: number; }

events.docs: Emitted when an issue is upvoted
